text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: All my fans start frownin' when I lose!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
That just won't stand! Next time, I'm gonna win
and put smiles on all their faces!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
And if I wanna win, it's back to training! Come on,
Trainer—let's get a move on!
choice_data_list: First, let's go over today's race!
First, let's go over today's race!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
And if I wanna win, it's back to training! Come on,
Trainer—let's get a move on!
choice_data_list: First, let's go over today's race!
First, let's go over today's race!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, but of course! I'm countin' on ya! Next
time, victory'll be ours!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: So fire up the grill for our celebratory cookout!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh, I forgot about that part!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Feedback is awful important! I don't wanna lose
the same way twice!
